productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Seattle Glow White Sweatshirt
description: CompositionWhite sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a hood with drawstrings, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a ribbed hem, two insert pockets on the sides, glow in the dark print and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately inside out with like colours in warm water and using mild detergentTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsKeep cosy on those chilly evenings with this stylish sweatshirt from wrangler. The soft cotton fabric is comfortable against your skin and gives you insulation against the elements. Expose the graphic print on the front to sunlight for a few minutes and watch it glow in the dark. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it as a top layer over your Sports kit or over a T-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
